title: Surgeon Vacancy at Narayana Health - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Narayana Health - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Narayana Health has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Gurgaon office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Narayana Health:
Narayana Health is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Health!
